name: cvd-record labels its output with the coordinated-disclosure audit-pack section so it is exportable
command: printf '%s' '[{"component":"lodash","severity":"critical","fixed_in":"4.17.21","advisory_id":"GHSA-x","source":"cisa-kev"},{"component":"left-pad","severity":"medium","advisory_id":"GHSA-y","source":"osv"}]' > f.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cvd-record.sh" --findings f.json --json 2>/dev/null >o.json; node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("o.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.audit_pack_section==="coordinated-disclosure"?0:1)' && echo c23-audit-pack 1>&2
